headline: A Look At Insulet (PODD) Valuation After A Sharp Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot and context Insulet (PODD) has drawn investor attention after a period of sharp share price pressure, with the stock down about 25% over the past month and about 38% over the past 3 months. That pullback comes despite the company reporting annual revenue of US$2.9b and net income of US$302.8m, raising questions about how the current valuation lines up with its underlying diabetes care business. See our latest analysis for Insulet. Looking beyond the recent...
